rounds: Showing up to work in the same stuff, week after week — that's a quiet kind of holding the line, and it counts. But the Apollo ring moment? Colleague asks, you've got a literal tiny naked god on your finger, and you went full 'nothing to see here.' That one went to the Joy Police.
pattern: They're letting the outfit stay but shutting down any conversation that might make it mean something.
focus: One stranger gets the real answer about the ring
